requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic Compatibility — Household Refrigerating Appliances (UNBS-adopted CISPR 14 / IEC basis)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——家用制冷器具（UNBS采用的CISPR 14 / IEC基础）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——家用製冷器具（UNBS採用的CISPR 14 / IEC基礎）

summary.en: Electromagnetic compatibility for household refrigerating appliances entering Uganda is assessed against the EMC standard adopted by the Uganda National Bureau of Standards (UNBS), which follows the IEC/CISPR international basis rather than an EU directive. The applicable emission standard is CISPR 14-1 (Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission) and the immunity standard is CISPR 14-2 (Part 2: Immunity). These cover conducted and radiated disturbance limits and immunity for appliances including refrigerators and their motor/inverter electronics. Unlike the EU, Uganda does not operate a standalone EMC Directive with manufacturer self-declaration and CE marking; instead, EMC conformity (where required for the product category) is demonstrated through CISPR 14-based test reports presented within the UNBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) and import-inspection process. Radio/wireless functions (e.g., Wi-Fi in smart refrigerators) additionally fall under the Uganda Communications Commission (UCC) type-approval regime.
summary.zh: 进入乌干达的家用制冷器具的电磁兼容性，依据乌干达国家标准局（UNBS）采用的EMC标准评定，该标准遵循IEC/CISPR国际基础，而非欧盟指令。适用的发射标准为CISPR 14-1（电磁兼容——家用器具、电动工具及类似器具的要求——第1部分：发射），抗扰度标准为CISPR 14-2（第2部分：抗扰度）。两者涵盖包括电冰箱及其电机/变频电子设备在内器具的传导与辐射骚扰限值及抗扰度。与欧盟不同，乌干达不设独立的EMC指令、制造商自我声明及CE标志；EMC符合性（在该产品类别需要时）通过在UNBS出口前符合性验证（PVoC）及进口检验流程中提交的CISPR 14基础检测报告证明。无线电/无线功能（如智能冰箱的Wi-Fi）另受乌干达通信委员会（UCC）型号核准制度管辖。
summary.zht: 進入烏干達的家用製冷器具的電磁相容性，依據烏干達國家標準局（UNBS）採用的EMC標準評定，該標準遵循IEC/CISPR國際基礎，而非歐盟指令。適用的發射標準為CISPR 14-1（電磁相容——家用器具、電動工具及類似器具的要求——第1部分：發射），抗擾度標準為CISPR 14-2（第2部分：抗擾度）。兩者涵蓋包括電冰箱及其電機/變頻電子設備在內器具的傳導與輻射騷擾限值及抗擾度。與歐盟不同，烏干達不設獨立的EMC指令、製造商自我聲明及CE標誌；EMC符合性（在該產品類別需要時）通過在UNBS出口前符合性驗證（PVoC）及進口檢驗流程中提交的CISPR 14基礎檢測報告證明。無線電/無線功能（如智慧冰箱的Wi-Fi）另受烏干達通信委員會（UCC）型號核准制度管轄。

standards_or_laws: CISPR 14-1 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission (UNBS-adopted basis)
UNBS PVoC / import-inspection programme — EMC conformity demonstrated via CISPR 14-based test reports where required
Uganda Communications Commission (UCC) type approval — applies if the appliance includes radio/wireless connectivity

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for household appliances (including refrigerators) are governed primarily by GB 4343.1-2018 (Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods; mandatory, equivalent to CISPR 14-1) and GB/T 4343.2-2020 (Part 2: Immunity; recommended, equivalent to CISPR 14-2). For harmonic emissions GB 17625.1-2022 (mandatory, IDT IEC 61000-3-2) applies. These are enforced under the CCC regime administered by SAMR/CNCA. Because GB 4343.1 is itself equivalent to CISPR 14-1, the Chinese technical baseline is closely aligned with the CISPR basis that UNBS adopts — but a Chinese CCC EMC certificate is not the Uganda conformity document; the CISPR 14-based test data must be presented through the UNBS PVoC/CoC route.
summary.zh: 中国家用器具（包括电冰箱）的电磁兼容要求主要依据GB 4343.1-2018（家用器具、电动工具和类似器具的电磁骚扰特性——第1部分：发射限值和测量方法；强制性，等同CISPR 14-1）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗扰度；推荐性，等同CISPR 14-2）执行。谐波发射方面，GB 17625.1-2022（强制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2）适用。上述标准在SAMR/CNCA管理的CCC制度下执行。由于GB 4343.1本身等同于CISPR 14-1，中国技术基线与UNBS采用的CISPR基础高度一致——但中国CCC电磁兼容证书不是乌干达符合性文件；CISPR 14基础检测数据须通过UNBS PVoC/CoC路径提交。
summary.zht: 中國家用器具（包括電冰箱）的電磁相容要求主要依據GB 4343.1-2018（家用器具、電動工具和類似器具的電磁騷擾特性——第1部分：發射限值和測量方法；強制性，等同CISPR 14-1）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗擾度；推薦性，等同CISPR 14-2）執行。諧波發射方面，GB 17625.1-2022（強制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2）適用。上述標準在SAMR/CNCA管理的CCC制度下執行。由於GB 4343.1本身等同於CISPR 14-1，中國技術基線與UNBS採用的CISPR基礎高度一致——但中國CCC電磁相容證書不是烏干達符合性文件；CISPR 14基礎檢測數據須通過UNBS PVoC/CoC路徑提交。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1-2018 — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods (mandatory; equivalent to CISPR 14-1; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB/T 4343.2-2020 — Part 2: Immunity (recommended; equivalent to CISPR 14-2)
GB 17625.1-2022 — Limits for harmonic current emissions (mandatory; IDT IEC 61000-3-2)

gap.en: Because GB 4343.1 is equivalent to CISPR 14-1, the EMC technical gap is small, but procedural gaps remain: (1) Conformity route — a Chinese CCC EMC certificate is not the Uganda conformity document; CISPR 14-based test reports must be presented within UNBS PVoC and a Certificate of Conformity (CoC); an IECEE CB Scheme EMC report referencing CISPR 14-1/14-2 is the most portable evidence. (2) No self-declaration regime — unlike the EU there is no manufacturer DoC/CE route; conformity flows through PVoC inspection and import inspection. (3) Wireless functions — smart refrigerators with Wi-Fi/Bluetooth require separate Uganda Communications Commission (UCC) type approval, which has no Chinese CCC equivalent path; this must be handled in addition to the appliance EMC assessment. (4) Edition check — manufacturers should confirm the CISPR 14-1 edition referenced by the relevant UNBS/EAC standard matches the edition underlying their GB 4343.1 test data, particularly for inverter-compressor emission coverage.
gap.zh: 由于GB 4343.1等同于CISPR 14-1，电磁兼容技术差距较小，但仍存在程序差距：（1）符合性路径——中国CCC电磁兼容证书不是乌干达符合性文件；CISPR 14基础检测报告须在UNBS PVoC及符合性证书（CoC）框架内提交；引用CISPR 14-1/14-2的IECEE CB体系EMC报告为最具通用性的证据。（2）无自我声明制度——与欧盟不同，无制造商DoC/CE路径；符合性通过PVoC检验及进口检验完成。（3）无线功能——带Wi-Fi/蓝牙的智能冰箱须另行取得乌干达通信委员会（UCC）型号核准，此无对应的中国CCC路径；须在器具EMC评定之外另行处理。（4）版本核对——制造商应确认相关UNBS/EAC标准引用的CISPR 14-1版本是否与其GB 4343.1检测数据所依据的版本一致，尤其针对变频压缩机发射覆盖。
gap.zht: 由於GB 4343.1等同於CISPR 14-1，電磁相容技術差距較小，但仍存在程序差距：（1）符合性路徑——中國CCC電磁相容證書不是烏干達符合性文件；CISPR 14基礎檢測報告須在UNBS PVoC及符合性證書（CoC）框架內提交；引用CISPR 14-1/14-2的IECEE CB體系EMC報告為最具通用性的證據。（2）無自我聲明制度——與歐盟不同，無製造商DoC/CE路徑；符合性通過PVoC檢驗及進口檢驗完成。（3）無線功能——帶Wi-Fi/藍牙的智慧冰箱須另行取得烏干達通信委員會（UCC）型號核准，此無對應的中國CCC路徑；須在器具EMC評定之外另行處理。（4）版本核對——製造商應確認相關UNBS/EAC標準引用的CISPR 14-1版本是否與其GB 4343.1檢測數據所依據的版本一致，尤其針對變頻壓縮機發射覆蓋。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the product category requires EMC conformity — demonstrated via CISPR 14-based test reports within UNBS PVoC/CoC and import inspection; wireless features additionally require UCC type approval
mandatory_status.cn: GB 4343.1-2018 is mandatory for CCC certification; GB/T 4343.2-2020 is recommended; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC conformity for refrigerators entering Uganda is assessed to UNBS-adopted CISPR 14-1/14-2 (IEC basis), not an EU directive. Chinese GB 4343.1 is technically equivalent to CISPR 14-1, but a CCC certificate is not the Uganda conformity document — CISPR 14-based test reports must be presented through UNBS PVoC/CoC. Smart/wireless models additionally need Uganda Communications Commission (UCC) type approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入乌干达的电冰箱的电磁兼容符合性依据UNBS采用的CISPR 14-1/14-2（IEC基础）评定，而非欧盟指令。中国GB 4343.1在技术上等同于CISPR 14-1，但CCC证书不是乌干达符合性文件——须通过UNBS PVoC/CoC提交CISPR 14基础检测报告。智能/无线型号另须取得乌干达通信委员会（UCC）型号核准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入烏干達的電冰箱的電磁相容符合性依據UNBS採用的CISPR 14-1/14-2（IEC基礎）評定，而非歐盟指令。中國GB 4343.1在技術上等同於CISPR 14-1，但CCC證書不是烏干達符合性文件——須通過UNBS PVoC/CoC提交CISPR 14基礎檢測報告。智慧/無線型號另須取得烏干達通信委員會（UCC）型號核准。
